  • Module
  • Tree

  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AddEvent
    Screen Controller for the Add Event screen From this screen, the user can add an event to a booking and configure its seating configuration
    AppData
    This class stores data to be passed between screens
    Application
    JavaFX Application class Runs on launch
    Booking
    Represents a booking enquiry for large events.
    Booking
    Class that stores attributes for a booking
    BookingsOverview
    Screen Controller for the Bookings Overview screen Shows the list of all bookings and a tab for that booking's events
    Calendar
    Screen Controller for Calendar Shows diary notes and venue availability
    Client
    Class that stores attributes for a Client
    ContractInfo
    Class that stores attributes for a contract
    ContractPage
    Screen Controller class for the ContractPage screen Shows all of a contract's details
    Contracts
    Screen Controller class to display a list of all contracts
    DailySheet
    Screen Controller for the Daily Sheet screen Shows all events occurring today
    DatabaseConnection
    This class connects the application to the database, handling the fetching, storing, deleting and updating of data
    DatabaseConnection.ClientInfo
    Helper class to store clientID and companyName Used while saving a booking and for contract details
    DatabaseInterface
    Interface for other teams to have indirect access to the Operations team database
    DatabaseMethods
    Class which contains the implementations of DatabaseInterface Provides the functionality for other teams to have indirect access to the Operations team database
    Diary
    Screen Controller for the Diary Lets the user write notes and store them in the database
    DiaryNote
    Class that stores attributes for a Diary Note
    Discount
    Represents discount details applied to ticket purchases.
    Event
    Class that stores attributes for an Event
    FinancialAndUsageTracking
     
    FinancialAndUsageTrackingImpl
    Implementation of financial and usage tracking.
    ICalendar
    Interface for the Calendar
    IEvent
    Interface for events
    InvoiceInfo
    Class to store attributes about an invoice
    InvoicePage
    Screen Controller class for the InvoicePage screen Shows all the details about a selected invoice
    Invoices
    Screen Controller class for the Invoices screen Shows a list of all invoices
    ISeatingConfig
    Interface for Seating Configurations
    JDBC
    Class which contains wrapper methods to provide other teams with indirect access to the Operations team database
    Launcher
    Main Launcher class used in compiling the .jar
    Login
    Screen Controller for the Login screen Only lets the user enter the main part of the application upon successful authorisation
    MainMenu
    Screen Controller class for the Main Menu screen Shows all buttons linking to other key parts of the application
    NewBooking
    Screen Controller for the New Booking screen Lets the user add a new booking and save it to the database
    OperationsInterface
    Interface defining operations-related functionalities.
    OperationsManager
    Implements OperationsInterface with basic method logic.
    Reviews
    Screen Controller for the Reviews screen
    ReviewsInfo
    Class that stores attributes for a review
    ReviewsPage
    Screen Controller for the ReviewsPage screen Shows a review for a selected event
    ScreenController
    Class that manages and handles the loading of all screens
    Seat
     
    Seating
    Represents reserved seating information for an event.
    SeatingConfig
    Class which stores attributes about an Event's Seating Configuration
    SeatingConfiguration
     
    SeatingConfigurationImpl
    Implementation of seating configuration management.
    Section
     
    UsageChart
    Screen Controller for the Usage Chart Shows the user events within a 3-week timeframe, showing information about each event through clickable, coloured bars
    UsageChart.ClickableBar
    Helper class to make event bars clickable
    Venue
    Represents a venue where events take place.
    VenueTable
    Class that stores information about a Venue
